name: wealth-tracker
description: 生财有迹（Wealth Tracker）是一款专注于个人资产分析的应用程序。其核心功能是：全面记录并展示用户的资产状况，帮助用户清晰地了解财务现状；结合每种资产的特性和当前经济环境，利用 AI 技术进行分析，并提供适宜的财务建议。
author: nicejade

scripts.desktop:dev: yarn build:web && cd desktop && npm run dev
scripts.desktop:build: yarn build:web && cd desktop && npm run build && npm run prepare-server
scripts.desktop:pack: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run pack
scripts.desktop:verify:pack: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run pack:verify
scripts.desktop:dist: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run dist
scripts.desktop:verify:dist: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:verify
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:mac
scripts.desktop:verify:dist:mac: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:mac:verify
scripts.desktop:dist:win: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:win
scripts.desktop:verify:dist:win: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:win:verify
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:linux
scripts.desktop:verify:dist:linux: yarn desktop:build && cd desktop && npm run dist:linux:verify
